prompt: Create a “happy” mood variation of this exact pig character, only changing the face mood: gentle smile, bright open eyes, cheerful expression. Keep the same pose, proportions, line style, stroke thickness, and exact color palette (#FFB8BC, #FD7874, #4C0331, #FFFFFF, #FFC0C4). No new colors. Maintain a soft, cute, kid-friendly look (not aggressive or exaggerated). White background. Ensure it clearly matches the original character and same skin color.
